channel.title: Parth Saraswat
channel.description: Writing about tech, life, and the things I learn along the way.

item.title: Looking Forward to 2023
item.description: Three areas of focus, concrete goals, and the day-to-day changes I want to make this year.

item.title: 2022 Recap and Reflections
item.description: A year of travel, podcasting, and personal growth — with procrastination as the biggest obstacle.

item.title: Refactoring and Clean Code
item.description: Method composition, data organization, and simplifying conditionals — everything I learned about refactoring.

item.title: How I Edit Podcast Episodes
item.description: A streamlined Logic Pro workflow that cuts editing time from 4–5 hours down to under 2.5.

item.title: A New Approach to The Blog
item.description: Shorter guides, daily updates, and a “document don’t create” philosophy for consistency.

item.title: Quantity vs Quality
item.description: Why a beginner creator should prioritize consistent output over perfection — practice and feedback come first.

item.title: What I Learnt from Blogging
item.description: Starting a blog reveals unexpected benefits — human connection and solidarity beyond the original intent.

item.title: How to Approach Side Projects
item.description: Three steps to side-project success: understand the idea, define what done means, and execute with clarity.

item.title: Contextual Book Recommendations 2020
item.description: Eight curated book picks tailored to different life situations and moods throughout the year.

item.title: Applying to Grad Schools in The US: a primer
item.description: A four-step guide: standardized tests, university selection, application prep, and submission deadlines.

item.title: The Best Way to Keep in Touch (Digitally)
item.description: Discord removes friction from digital communication by emulating real-life interaction through audio and shared activities.

item.title: My Writing Process
item.description: A five-step approach to turning abstract ideas into polished blog posts through progressive structuring.

item.title: What do I do With My Life?
item.description: Uncertainty about your future is normal — experiment to learn about yourself before making major decisions.

item.title: Getting Ready To Start A Career
item.description: Transitioning from structured education to a career means shifting from goal-oriented to behavior-oriented thinking.
